dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8209 RH: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the school-based health centers grant program.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Tonko (for himself, Mr. Balderson, and Mr. Bergman) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce
Additional sponsors: Ms. Pressley, Mr. Fitzpatrick, and Ms. McClellan
Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the school-based health centers grant program.

section.header: Reauthorization of school-based health centers grant program
section.text: Section 399Z–1(m) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 280h–5(m)) is amended by striking such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2022 through 2026 and inserting $55,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2031.

endorsement.action-desc: Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed
